name: Shift Changeover Communication Gap
description: Blend temperature drifts into Warning during Shift A; the handover to Shift B does not formally escalate it.

steps.note: Blend vessel temperature drifting into Warning during Shift A.
Outgoing shift does not formally escalate the condition.

steps.handover_notes: Incoming shift has no persistent record of the prior trend.
steps.note: Incoming shift starts with no context on the ongoing drift.
